item.title: How Does It Know That?
item.description: A surprising or impressive system reacts with unexpected accuracy. Watch as technology or skill demonstrates knowledge in a way that leaves viewers amazed.

media:content.media:title: How Does It Know That?
media:content.media:description: A surprising or impressive system reacts with unexpected accuracy. Watch as technology or skill demonstrates knowledge in a way that leaves viewers amazed.

item.title: Six Used Cars to Never Buy
item.description: Discover six used cars that are best avoided. Learn about common issues, costly repairs, and why these models often leave owners regretting the purchase.

media:content.media:title: Six Used Cars to Never Buy
media:content.media:description: Discover six used cars that are best avoided. Learn about common issues, costly repairs, and why these models often leave owners regretting the purchase.

item.title: This Showed Us What’s Wrong
item.description: A revealing moment exposes problems that were overlooked. Watch as issues come to light and lessons are learned for better decision-making.

media:content.media:title: This Showed Us What’s Wrong
media:content.media:description: A revealing moment exposes problems that were overlooked. Watch as issues come to light and lessons are learned for better decision-making.

item.title: The True Cost of Timing Belt Swaps
item.description: Break down the real numbers behind timing belt replacements. Learn what drives costs, parts, labor, and why it can be more expensive than expected.

media:content.media:title: The True Cost of Timing Belt Swaps
media:content.media:description: Break down the real numbers behind timing belt replacements. Learn what drives costs, parts, labor, and why it can be more expensive than expected.

item.title: Diesel Trucks to Buy and Avoid
item.description: Discover which diesel trucks are worth buying and which to avoid. Insights on reliability, common issues, and what to look for when choosing a diesel truck.

media:content.media:title: Diesel Trucks to Buy and Avoid
media:content.media:description: Discover which diesel trucks are worth buying and which to avoid. Insights on reliability, common issues, and what to look for when choosing a diesel truck.

item.title: The Engine Is Broken
item.description: A vehicle faces a major setback with a broken engine. Watch the diagnosis, challenges, and repair process as the problem is tackled step by step.

media:content.media:title: The Engine Is Broken
media:content.media:description: A vehicle faces a major setback with a broken engine. Watch the diagnosis, challenges, and repair process as the problem is tackled step by step.

item.title: Why This Car Can’t Be Street Legal
item.description: Explore why this car fails to meet street-legal requirements. From safety to modifications, see the challenges that prevent it from hitting public roads.

media:content.media:title: Why This Car Can’t Be Street Legal
media:content.media:description: Explore why this car fails to meet street-legal requirements. From safety to modifications, see the challenges that prevent it from hitting public roads.

item.title: Charging $500 for a Lamborghini Oil Change
item.description: Learn how and why an oil change for a Lamborghini costs $500. Insights into luxury car maintenance, high-performance requirements, and expert service techniques.

media:content.media:title: Charging $500 for a Lamborghini Oil Change
media:content.media:description: Learn how and why an oil change for a Lamborghini costs $500. Insights into luxury car maintenance, high-performance requirements, and expert service techniques.

item.title: Bad News for This Customer
item.description: A customer faces unexpected and unwelcome news. Watch the situation unfold and see how challenges or issues are addressed with honesty and clarity.

media:content.media:title: Bad News for This Customer
media:content.media:description: A customer faces unexpected and unwelcome news. Watch the situation unfold and see how challenges or issues are addressed with honesty and clarity.

item.title: 2003 Mustang Cobra Tune-Up
item.description: Watch an American muscle car, the 2003 Mustang Cobra, get a full tune-up. See the maintenance, adjustments, and performance checks that keep this classic running strong.

media:content.media:title: 2003 Mustang Cobra Tune-Up
media:content.media:description: Watch an American muscle car, the 2003 Mustang Cobra, get a full tune-up. See the maintenance, adjustments, and performance checks that keep this classic running strong.

item.title: Shop Update: Tackling Tough Jobs
item.description: A behind-the-scenes look at the shop as challenging jobs are handled. Watch the process, problem-solving, and dedication to get tough projects completed.

media:content.media:title: Shop Update: Tackling Tough Jobs
media:content.media:description: A behind-the-scenes look at the shop as challenging jobs are handled. Watch the process, problem-solving, and dedication to get tough projects completed.
